  },
  "communicative_task_achievement": "Yes",

    "Responds appropriately to the Telegram post context.",
    "Provides three relevant tips on time management (apps, limiting social media, sleep/food).",
    "Writes 11 sentences, meeting the approximate 10-sentence requirement."
  ],
  "grammar_score": 0.68,
  "corrections": [
    "i -> I (Register; A1; Low)",
    "simular -> similar (Lexis; A2; Low)",
    "Here is the tips -> Here are the tips (Grammar; A1; Medium)",
    "this apps -> these apps (Grammar; A1; Medium)",
    "spend a lot of time to TV -> spend a lot of time on TV (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "leave from useless groups -> leave useless groups (Grammar; B1; Low)",
    "enought -> enough (Lexis; A2; Low)",
    "I hope, my tips -> I hope my tips (Punctuation; B1; Low)",
    "write me at personal messages -> message me privately (Lexis; B1; Medium)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [
      {"excerpt": "simular", "correction": "similar", "comment": "Spelling error; phonetic confusion.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "enought", "correction": "enough", "comment": "Spelling error; common A2 word.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "write me at personal messages", "correction": "message me privately", "comment": "Awkward L1-influenced phrasing; 'personal messages' is not idiomatic English.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"}
    ],
    "Grammar": [
      {"excerpt": "Here is the tips", "correction": "Here are the tips", "comment": "Subject-verb agreement error; 'tips' is plural.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A1"},
      {"excerpt": "this apps", "correction": "these apps", "comment": "Demonstrative agreement; plural noun requires 'these'.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A1"},
      {"excerpt": "spend a lot of time to TV", "correction": "spend a lot of time on TV", "comment": "Preposition error; 'spend time on' is the correct collocation.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"},
      {"excerpt": "leave from useless groups", "correction": "leave useless groups", "comment": "Unnecessary preposition 'from' after 'leave'.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B1"}

      {"excerpt": "I hope, my tips", "correction": "I hope my tips", "comment": "Unnecessary comma after 'hope'.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B1"}
    ],

    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],
    "Discourse markers": [],
    "Rhetorical features": [],

      {"excerpt": "i", "correction": "I", "comment": "Lowercase personal pronoun; standard English requires capitalization.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "A1"}
    ],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [
    {"item": "Manage your time", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "B1 imperative with appropriate verb-noun collocation."},
    {"item": "useless", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "B1 adjective used correctly."},
    {"item": "energy", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "B1 noun; appropriate context."},
    {"item": "You should leave / You can find", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Grammar", "note": "Modal verbs used correctly for advice and possibility."},
    {"item": "Numbered list organization (1, 2, 3)", "cefr_level": "B1", "category": "Discourse marker", "note": "Clear organizational structure for tips; above A2 expectations."}
  ],
  "feedback": "CEFR Level A2. The text communicates the message clearly with three relevant tips, but shows limited vocabulary range and frequent basic errors (agreement, prepositions, spelling). Register awareness is weak (lowercase 'i'). Strengths include correct use of modal verbs (should, can) and clear list organization, which show B1 ambition. Grammar score 0.68 reflects acceptable control for A2 with errors that do not impede meaning.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Practice subject-verb agreement and demonstrative pronouns (this/these, is/are) with plural nouns.",
    "Learn common verb + preposition collocations (spend time ON, write TO someone).",
    "Focus on spelling of high-frequency words (similar, enough) and always capitalize 'I'."
  ]
}

      {"excerpt": "each my day", "correction": "each of my days", "comment": "Determiner error: 'each' cannot directly modify a possessive + noun; requires 'each of my' or simply 'each day'.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "B1"},
      {"excerpt": "other's works", "correction": "others' works", "comment": "Incorrect possessive form; 'others'' (plural possessive) or 'other people's' is needed.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B2"},
      {"excerpt": "But very important thing", "correction": "But a very important thing", "comment": "Missing indefinite article before singular countable noun 'thing'.", "impact": "Medium", "cefr_threshold": "A2"}
    ],
    "Punctuation": [
      {"excerpt": "Firstly I want", "correction": "Firstly, I want", "comment": "Missing comma after introductory discourse marker.", "impact": "Low", "cefr_threshold": "B1"}
    ],

    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],

    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },

    {"item": "overload yourself", "cefr_level": "B2", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "Good B2-level verb collocation used correctly."},
    {"item": "assignments", "cefr_level": "B2", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "Appropriate academic vocabulary for university context."},
    {"item": "abuse this help", "cefr_level": "B2", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "Advanced verb 'abuse' used appropriately in context."},
    {"item": "resources", "cefr_level": "B2", "category": "Vocabulary", "note": "Abstract noun used appropriately."},
    {"item": "However, Firstly, For example, Also", "cefr_level": "B2", "category": "Discourse marker", "note": "Good range and placement of discourse markers for text cohesion."}

  "feedback": "CEFR Level: B1. This text demonstrates solid B1 proficiency with some B2 vocabulary ambition. The learner uses a good range of discourse markers (However, Firstly, For example, Also) to organize ideas coherently. Vocabulary includes B2 items such as 'overload', 'assignments', 'abuse', and 'resources'. However, grammar control remains at B1: missing preposition after 'tips', article omission ('very important thing'), determiner error ('each my day'), and a spelling error ('decition'). Punctuation shows minor gaps (missing comma after 'Firstly'). The text fully addresses the task with relevant, well-organized tips. Grammar score 0.76 reflects moderate error density with low impact on comprehensibility.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Practice noun + preposition patterns (e.g., 'tips on', 'advice on', 'suggestion for') to avoid omissions.",
    "Review article usage with singular countable nouns, especially in sentence-initial position.",
    "Continue using B2 vocabulary in context while proofreading for spelling of high-frequency words like 'decision'."
  ]
}
